subcodes.first_line: O sagacious and noble one! Gallop thy steed in the arena of heavenly beings, and raise thy voice upon the broad plain of the followers of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هوشمند ارجمند سمندی در میدان لاهوتیان بران و گوای در پهن دشت بهائیان بزن
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
